context: Tests whether the agent handles iOS 18+ Core ML stateful prediction and MLTensor preprocessing with source-accurate concurrency and materialization rules.

checklist.name: State creation and prediction
checklist.description: Creates state with `model.makeState()` and passes it to a valid iOS 18+ stateful prediction overload.

checklist.name: Serialized state access
checklist.description: States that predictions sharing the same `MLState` must be serialized and that state buffers must not be read or written while prediction is in flight.

checklist.name: Sendable nuance
checklist.description: Does not claim `MLState` is non-Sendable; explains that Sendable does not remove the per-state serialization requirement.

checklist.name: Tensor materialization
checklist.description: Uses `await tensor.shapedArray(of:)` or an equivalent awaited `MLTensor` materialization before bridging into Core ML input types.

checklist.name: Supported tensor APIs
checklist.description: Avoids invented APIs such as `MLTensor(multiArray)`, `tensor.standardDeviation()`, direct lazy-buffer access, or synchronous tensor extraction.

checklist.name: Stream lifecycle
checklist.description: Uses one state per independent stream and resets streaming context by replacing the state with a fresh `model.makeState()`.
